recipes.title: Khopra Pak
steps: Add Mawa and sugar to it.
Mix till sugar dissolves and heat it a bit.
Add Khopra Bura towards the end and mix vigorously.
Add Milk 1-2 tsp if mixture seems too dry (it depends on quality of mawa)
Apply bit of ghee to a square dish and add mixture to it for setting in.
Once settled, sprinkle some saffron water on top for look and flavor.
